text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm passing by the station one day<n>when I spot
Marvelous Sunday<n>talking with a fortune teller.

text_block_list.name: Fortune Teller
text_block_list.text:
Hmm! Ohoho! The path is clear... I<n>have seen into
your future!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, what kind of marvelous things<n>have you
gleaned?

text_block_list.name: Fortune Teller
text_block_list.text:
From the heavens will fall the<n>inescapable threat
of fangs and<n>claws as sharp as blades! You
must<n>escape before this calamity—

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
In other words... something<n>marvelous is on the
way! Ooh, might<n>that be it over there?

text_block_list.name: Fortune Teller
text_block_list.text: W-wait! Don't leave before I'm<n>done!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Intrigued by their exchange, I go<n>running after
Marvelous Sunday.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Aha, this must be the spot!

text_block_list.name: Cat
text_block_list.text: Raaaooow!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Oh dear! That was a close one! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Out of nowhere, a cat came hurtling<n>down toward
Marvelous Sunday, but<n>she managed to catch it
in her arms.

text_block_list.name: Apartment Resident
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm so sorry! She jumped off the<n>balcony all of
a sudden!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
No need to apologize! I'm just glad<n>your kitty's
unharmed! ☆

text_block_list.name: Apartment Resident
text_block_list.text:
She's a member of the family. Thank<n>you so
much for saving her.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! You two certainly do share a<n>marvelous
bond! ★

text_block_list.name: Fortune Teller
text_block_list.text:
That was the calamity I foretold. How<n>interesting
that she evaded all harm<n>entirely on her own...

text_block_list.name: Apartment Resident
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Wait, you're the fortune teller<n>that gave me
a reading yesterday!

text_block_list.name: Apartment Resident
text_block_list.text:
You told me I was sure to seize true<n>love, but my
crush turned me down<n>the moment I shared my
feelings!<n>What do I do now, you fraud?!

text_block_list.name: Fortune Teller
text_block_list.text: The veil is parting, my eyes see all...What's this?! Dark misfortune loomsin my future!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Wow, you told your crush you liked<n>them? How
marvelous! ☆

text_block_list.name: Apartment Resident
text_block_list.text: Huh? What's so marvelous about it?

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Why, the courage to confess your<n>true feelings,
and the passionate fury<n>of your love!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Your strong heart is marvelous! ☆ Oh,<n>it's the
most marvelous of all<n>marvelous things! ★

text_block_list.name: Apartment Resident
text_block_list.text:
But if I got rejected, what does any<n>of that
matter?!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: You might have been rejected, butI'm sure you'll be able to findtrue true love someday! You'reso marvelous that it's simply boundto happen! ☆★☆

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Just keep your chin up and march on<n>toward the
marvelous future that<n>awaits you! ☆

text_block_list.name: Apartment Resident
text_block_list.text: The future that awaits me...

text_block_list.name: Apartment Resident
text_block_list.text: Yeah, you know what? I willkeep moving forward, and I'll find aneven better partner!

text_block_list.name: Fortune Teller
text_block_list.text:
I'm... I'm saved? In the future I saw,<n>she was
absolutely livid with me, and<n>yet...

text_block_list.name: Fortune Teller
text_block_list.text:
Could it be... that you've changed the<n>weave of
fate, just as you did with<n>that cat earlier?

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Yep! ☆ I can change the future into<n>something
much more marvelous!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Come on! Let's take our first steps<n>toward
making the world even more<n>marvelous! ☆

text_block_list.name: Fortune Teller
text_block_list.text:
Yes, of course! This is... marvelous!<n>Simply
maaarvelous!
